data.text: the plain or ornamental tag covering the ends of a lace or point
any of various ornamental studs, cords, or pins worn on clothing

enrichment.etymology: Middle English agglot, aglet, borrowed from Middle French aguillette, diminutive of aguille "needle, pin," going back to Old French, going back to Gallo-Latin acūcula, alteration (with ū from Latin acūtus "pointed") of Late Latin acucula "ornamental pin, pine needle," diminutive of Latin acus "needle, pin"
